classes.name: boat
classes.description: Generic boat or vessel when specific type cannot be determined
classes.visual_characteristics: Variable vessel characteristics, unable to classify into specific boat type

classes.name: boat - tug
classes.description: Tugboat used for towing or pushing other vessels
classes.visual_characteristics: Compact, powerful hull with high freeboard, often brightly colored
classes.color_markers: Often red, yellow, or orange hull

classes.name: boat - sailboat under power
classes.description: Sailboat operating with engine power, sails down
classes.visual_characteristics: Mast present, engine wake visible, sails furled

classes.name: boat - sailboat under sail
classes.description: Sailboat operating solely under wind power
classes.visual_characteristics: Sails deployed, mast visible, minimal or no wake
classes.color_markers: Variable, white hulls and sails common

classes.name: boat - submarine
classes.description: Submersible naval vessel
classes.visual_characteristics: Cigar-shaped hull, conning tower, minimal superstructure

classes.name: boat - warship
classes.description: Military naval vessel
classes.visual_characteristics: Large, angular superstructure, weapons systems visible
classes.color_markers: Gray hull, military gray paint scheme

classes.name: boat - merchant ship
classes.description: Commercial cargo or container vessel
classes.visual_characteristics: Large rectangular superstructure, cargo containers or holds visible
classes.color_markers: Often red hull below waterline, variable above

classes.name: boat - commercial fishing boat
classes.description: Commercial fishing vessel with nets, trawls, or other fishing equipment
classes.visual_characteristics: Fishing gear visible, working deck, often smaller to medium size
classes.color_markers: Variable, often white or blue hull

classes.name: boat - recreational fishing boat
classes.description: Small to medium recreational fishing vessel
classes.visual_characteristics: Open or partially enclosed deck, fishing rods visible, smaller size

classes.name: boat - pleasure craft
classes.description: Recreational motorboat or yacht
classes.visual_characteristics: Clean lines, often sleek design, no commercial equipment
classes.color_markers: Variable, often white or bright colors

classes.name: boat - personal watercraft
classes.description: Jet ski, wave runner, or similar small personal watercraft
classes.visual_characteristics: Very small, low profile, high speed capability

classes.name: boat - kayak_canoe
classes.description: Human-powered kayak or canoe
classes.visual_characteristics: Very small, low profile, paddlers visible
classes.color_markers: Variable, often bright colors for visibility

classes.name: boat - seaplanes
classes.description: Aircraft capable of landing on water
classes.visual_characteristics: Aircraft fuselage with floats or hull, wings visible
classes.color_markers: Variable, often white or bright colors

classes.name: boat - ferry
classes.description: Passenger or vehicle ferry vessel
classes.visual_characteristics: Large, boxy superstructure, multiple decks, vehicle ramps

classes.name: boat - barge
classes.description: Flat-bottomed cargo vessel, often towed
classes.visual_characteristics: Rectangular, low profile, minimal superstructure

classes.name: boat - dredger
classes.description: Vessel equipped for dredging operations
classes.visual_characteristics: Large equipment visible, often stationary or slow-moving

classes.name: boat - law enforcement
classes.description: Law enforcement or coast guard vessel
classes.visual_characteristics: Often high-speed capable, blue lights or markings
classes.color_markers: Often blue, white, or official colors

classes.name: boat - unclassified boat
classes.description: Boat that cannot be classified into specific categories
classes.visual_characteristics: Variable

classes.name: boat - drilling ship
classes.description: Offshore drilling platform or vessel
classes.visual_characteristics: Large, complex superstructure, drilling equipment visible
classes.color_markers: Often yellow or orange equipment, white or gray hull

classes.name: dayshape
classes.description: Generic day shape or navigation status indicator when specific type cannot be determined
classes.visual_characteristics: Variable dayshape characteristics, unable to classify into specific dayshape type

classes.name: dayshape - not under command
classes.description: Day shape indicating vessel not under command (two black balls)
classes.visual_characteristics: Two black spherical shapes, one above the other

classes.name: dayshape - restricted in ability to maneuver
classes.description: Day shape indicating vessel restricted in ability to maneuver (ball-diamond-ball)
classes.visual_characteristics: Three shapes: ball, diamond, ball, vertically arranged

classes.name: dayshape - constrained by draft
classes.description: Day shape indicating vessel constrained by draft (cylinder)
classes.visual_characteristics: Cylindrical black shape

classes.name: dayshape - pilot vessel on duty
classes.description: Day shape indicating pilot vessel on duty (ball over flag)
classes.visual_characteristics: Black ball above flag shape

classes.name: dayshape - anchored
classes.description: Day shape indicating vessel at anchor (ball)
classes.visual_characteristics: Single black spherical shape

classes.name: dayshape - vessel under sail and power
classes.description: Day shape indicating vessel under sail and power (cone apex down)
classes.visual_characteristics: Black cone with apex pointing downward

classes.name: dayshape - towing or towed vessel
classes.description: Day shape indicating towing or towed vessel (diamond)
classes.visual_characteristics: Black diamond shape

classes.name: dayshape - fishing with restricted maneuverability
classes.description: Day shape indicating fishing vessel with restricted maneuverability (two cones apex together)
classes.visual_characteristics: Two black cones with apexes together

classes.name: dayshape - minesweeping
classes.description: Day shape indicating minesweeping operations (three balls)
classes.visual_characteristics: Three black spherical shapes

classes.name: dayshape - aground
classes.description: Day shape indicating vessel aground (three balls)
classes.visual_characteristics: Three black spherical shapes

classes.name: flag
classes.description: Generic flag when specific type cannot be determined
classes.visual_characteristics: Variable flag characteristics, unable to classify into specific flag type

classes.name: flag - dive flag
classes.description: Diver down flag (red with white diagonal stripe)
classes.visual_characteristics: Rectangular flag, red field with white diagonal stripe

classes.name: flag - pilot flag
classes.description: Pilot flag indicating pilot vessel or pilot on board
classes.visual_characteristics: Rectangular flag, typically white over red horizontal stripes

classes.name: lights
classes.description: Generic navigation lights when specific configuration cannot be determined
classes.visual_characteristics: Variable lights characteristics, unable to classify into specific lights type

classes.name: lights - power driven vessels
classes.description: Navigation lights for power-driven vessel (red port, green starboard, white stern)
classes.visual_characteristics: Red light on port side, green on starboard, white stern light

classes.name: lights - power driven vessel towing < 200 m
classes.description: Navigation lights for power vessel towing with tow length less than 200 meters
classes.visual_characteristics: Standard lights plus yellow towing light

classes.name: lights - power driven vessel towing > 200 m
classes.description: Navigation lights for power vessel towing with tow length greater than 200 meters
classes.visual_characteristics: Standard lights plus three white masthead lights in vertical line

classes.name: lights - fishing trawler
classes.description: Navigation lights for fishing trawler (red over white)
classes.visual_characteristics: Red light over white light, both visible all around

classes.name: lights - fishing not trawling
classes.description: Navigation lights for fishing vessel not trawling (red over red)
classes.visual_characteristics: Two red lights, one over the other, both visible all around

classes.name: lights - not under command
classes.description: Navigation lights for vessel not under command (red over red)
classes.visual_characteristics: Two red lights, one over the other, both visible all around

classes.name: lights - restricted in ability to maneuver
classes.description: Navigation lights for vessel restricted in ability to maneuver (red-white-red)
classes.visual_characteristics: Three lights in vertical line: red, white, red, all visible all around

classes.name: lights - constrained by draft
classes.description: Navigation lights for vessel constrained by draft (three red lights)
classes.visual_characteristics: Three red lights in vertical line, all visible all around

classes.name: lights - pilot vessel on duty
classes.description: Navigation lights for pilot vessel on duty (white over red)
classes.visual_characteristics: White light over red light, both visible all around

classes.name: lights - anchored or aground
classes.description: Navigation lights for vessel at anchor or aground (white all around)
classes.visual_characteristics: White light visible all around, may be two if vessel over 50m

classes.name: structure
classes.description: Generic structure when specific type cannot be determined
classes.visual_characteristics: Variable structure characteristics, unable to classify into specific structure type

classes.name: structure - drilling platform
classes.description: Offshore drilling platform or rig
classes.visual_characteristics: Large fixed or floating structure, drilling equipment visible
classes.color_markers: Often yellow or orange equipment, white or gray structure

classes.name: structure - piling
classes.description: Vertical piling or post structure
classes.visual_characteristics: Vertical cylindrical or square post, often in groups
classes.color_markers: Variable, often wood, concrete, or metal

classes.name: structure - dock
classes.description: Dock or wharf structure
classes.visual_characteristics: Horizontal platform extending into water, often with pilings
classes.color_markers: Variable, often wood, concrete, or metal

classes.name: structure - pier
classes.description: Pier or jetty structure
classes.visual_characteristics: Narrow structure extending into water, often perpendicular to shore
classes.color_markers: Variable, often wood, concrete, or metal

classes.name: structure - bridge
classes.description: Bridge structure over waterway
classes.visual_characteristics: Large spanning structure, supports visible

classes.name: structure - unknown structure
classes.description: Unidentified or unclassified structure
classes.visual_characteristics: Variable

classes.name: nav aid
classes.description: Generic navigation aid when specific type cannot be determined
classes.visual_characteristics: Variable nav aid characteristics, unable to classify into specific nav aid type

classes.name: nav aid - port side green floating channel marker
classes.description: Green floating channel marker indicating port side of channel (US: keep to starboard)
classes.visual_characteristics: Green can or nun buoy, may have number or letter

classes.name: nav aid - starboard side red floating channel marker
classes.description: Red floating channel marker indicating starboard side of channel (US: keep to port)
classes.visual_characteristics: Red nun or can buoy, may have number or letter

classes.name: nav aid - yellow-floating-hazard-marker
classes.description: Yellow floating marker indicating hazard or special area
classes.visual_characteristics: Yellow buoy or marker, may have various shapes

classes.name: nav aid - junction preferred channel to stbd
classes.description: Junction marker indicating preferred channel to starboard
classes.visual_characteristics: Red and green horizontal bands, top band red

classes.name: nav aid - junction preferred channel to port
classes.description: Junction marker indicating preferred channel to port
classes.visual_characteristics: Red and green horizontal bands, top band green

classes.name: nav aid - safe-water-floating-channel-marker
classes.description: Safe water marker indicating navigable water all around
classes.visual_characteristics: Red and white vertical stripes, spherical or pillar shape

classes.name: nav aid - regulatory markers
classes.description: Regulatory marker indicating rules or restrictions
classes.visual_characteristics: White with orange border and symbol, various shapes

classes.name: nav aid - range marker
classes.description: Range marker for alignment navigation
classes.visual_characteristics: Two markers in line, often daymarks or lights

classes.name: nav aid - lighthouse
classes.description: Lighthouse structure for navigation
classes.visual_characteristics: Tall tower structure, often distinctive shape and color
classes.color_markers: Variable, often white, red, or striped

classes.name: nav aid - red triangle daymark
classes.description: Red triangular daymark for navigation
classes.visual_characteristics: Red triangular shape, often on post or structure

classes.name: nav aid - green square daymark
classes.description: Green square daymark for navigation
classes.visual_characteristics: Green square shape, often on post or structure

classes.name: nav aid - special yellow square marker
classes.description: Special yellow square marker
classes.visual_characteristics: Yellow square shape

classes.name: nav aid - special yellow triangle marker
classes.description: Special yellow triangle marker
classes.visual_characteristics: Yellow triangular shape

classes.name: nav aid - regulatory marker
classes.description: Regulatory marker (alternative classification)
classes.visual_characteristics: White with orange border and symbol

classes.name: buoy
classes.description: Generic buoy when specific type cannot be determined
classes.visual_characteristics: Floating marker or buoy, unable to classify into specific buoy type

classes.name: buoy - mooring ball
classes.description: Mooring ball for vessel mooring
classes.visual_characteristics: Spherical or cylindrical float, often white or blue

classes.name: buoy - fishing buoy
classes.description: Fishing buoy marking fishing gear or trap
classes.visual_characteristics: Small float, often brightly colored, may have flag
classes.color_markers: Variable, often bright colors (orange, yellow, red)
